title: neltuma chilensis var. chilensis
intro: Neltuma chilensis var. chilensis, also known as Chilean neltuma or Chilean firebush, is a species of flowering plant in the family Bignoniaceae, native to Chile and Argentina. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which help to treat various health issues. The medicinal properties of Neltuma chilensis var. chilensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing, making it a valuable herb for treating colds, flu, and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Neltuma chilensis var. chilensis can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to take advantage of its medicinal benefits.
